docs.event: On 12:35 am on 14 August, 2023, Dave shared his recent activities with Calvin, mentioning he had attended a car workshop in San Francisco. He described the experience as inspiring and noted the passion and dedication of the participants. Calvin expressed his excitement and support, praising Dave's enthusiasm. Dave then inquired about Calvin's recent activities, to which Calvin asked about Dave's progress on his project. Dave responded positively, sharing a photo of a car he was restoring, noting its transformation from a 'beat-up mess' to a 'real beauty'.

On 15 October 2023, at 9:39 am, Dave shared his excitement about the music festival he attended, describing the energy, music, and crowd as amazing. He felt alive and shared a photo of the main stage. Calvin expressed interest in Dave's experience, asking for photos and sharing his own positive experience from a festival in Tokyo, where he met talented artists and learned valuable advice from professionals in the music industry. Dave showed interest in Calvin's experience, asking which band he enjoyed the most and shared a photo of a concert with Aerosmith, highlighting their incredible performance. Calvin expressed enthusiasm about Aerosmith's performance.

Calvin shared a photo of a living room with a couch, table, and television, expressing gratitude to his agent for finding him a nice place to stay. He mentioned that he would be working in a studio but would use the living room for relaxation. Dave asked where Calvin found a place to stay, and Calvin thanked his agent for finding him an awesome place. Calvin also shared a photo of a recording studio with a monitor and keyboard, emphasizing his focus on his music. Later, Calvin described the living room as cozy and relaxing, where he watches music videos, concerts, and documentaries about artists to get inspired. He shared this photo again, highlighting the setup as a place to unwind and gain inspiration.

On 3:13 pm on 8 October, 2023, Dave thanked Calvin for his support, emphasizing that it means a lot to him. Dave expressed his gratitude and stated that he would stay focused and keep going, appreciating the encouragement. Calvin responded by affirming his support and encouragement, saying he would always be there to boost Dave. On 1:12 pm on 3 August, 2023, Calvin thanked Dave for his support, stating that it means a lot to him. Calvin mentioned that he would stay focused and keep going for his dreams, and Dave encouraged him to stay focused and keep going. Calvin reiterated his appreciation for Dave's support and encouragement, emphasizing that it means a lot to him and that he would keep going for his dreams.

On 23 March 2023, at 11:53 am, Calvin thanked Dave for his help and support, expressing his gratitude and stating that he would let Dave know if he needed any assistance. On 20 April 2023, at 4:15 pm, Calvin shared with Dave that a producer had given him advice to stay true to himself and sound unique, which motivated him to think about his future in music. Dave responded positively, encouraging Calvin to stay true to himself and expressing interest in where Calvin's music was heading. On 3 August 2023, at 1:12 pm, Calvin again thanked Dave for his support and encouragement, emphasizing that Dave's words meant a lot to him and that he was determined to pursue his dreams. Dave expressed his eagerness to see Calvin succeed and reminded him not to forget his dreams.

Dave shared a photo of a man working on a car in a garage, recounting his early fascination with car engineering that began when he was ten years old. He described how he fixed an old car in a neighbor's garage, transforming it from a broken-down state to a high-running one, which gave him a sense of accomplishment and sparked his passion for car engineering. Dave has been working on cars ever since, and he shared a photo of a black car parked in a parking lot, indicating he had completed a restoration project but sold it to a collector. Dave also shared a photo of a man working on a car engine in a garage to illustrate the concept of dedication and hard work, emphasizing the importance of staying true to oneself and one's style. He currently works on challenging but cool projects and shared another photo of a man working on a car engine in a garage, expressing his enthusiasm and dedication to his work. Calvin praised Dave's efforts and encouraged him to keep up the good work, with Dave promising to continue learning and eventually build a custom car from scratch.

On 12:35 am on 14 August, 2023, Dave expressed gratitude to Calvin for his support, saying, 'Thanks, Cal! Your support means a lot to me.' Calvin responded with encouragement, stating, 'You got this, Dave! I'm always here for you. Seeing your enthusiasm is amazing. Keep growing, buddy. It'll be worth it! Good luck with that. See ya!'On 3:13 pm on 8 October, 2023, Dave again expressed gratitude to Calvin, saying, 'Thanks, Calvin! Your support really means a lot. I'll stay focused and keep going. Appreciate the encouragement!' Calvin affirmed Dave's efforts, saying, 'Yeah Dave! I'll always be here to support you and give you that boost. You're doing great!' Dave further acknowledged Calvin's support, saying, 'Thanks so much, Calvin. Your support means everything to me. I'll keep pushing and reaching for them.' Calvin encouraged Dave, saying, 'No worries, Dave. Keep going for it. You got this!'
On 25 October 2023 at 8:25 pm, Calvin expressed gratitude to Dave for his support, saying, 'Thanks, Dave! I appreciate your support. Let's keep pushing for our goals. Catch you later, see ya!'
On 3 August 2023 at 1:12 pm, Calvin again expressed gratitude to Dave, saying, 'Thanks, Dave! I'll stay focused and keep going. Appreciate your belief!'

On 8 October 2023 at 3:13 pm, Dave expressed gratitude to Calvin for his support, saying, 'Thanks, Calvin! Your support really means a lot. I'll stay focused and keep going. Appreciate the encouragement!'
Calvin responded to Dave's gratitude, saying, 'Yeah Dave! I'll always be here to support you and give you that boost. You're doing great!'
Dave acknowledged Calvin's support, saying, 'Thanks so much, Calvin. Your support means everything to me. I'll keep pushing and reaching for them.'

On 3 May, 2023 at 1:16 pm, Dave bid farewell to Calvin, expressing his support and encouragement, saying, 'No worries, Calvin! Glad I could help. Keep pursuing your music and never give up. You're awesome! 🤘.' Calvin responded with gratitude, saying, 'Thanks, appreciate it. Won't give up. Let's stay in touch! Bye!'On 26 March, 2023 at 4:45 pm, Calvin bid farewell to Dave, saying, 'Thanks, Dave! Gonna have fun and stay safe with it. Bye!'On 11 August, 2023 at 5:22 pm, Dave bid farewell to Calvin, offering encouragement and support, saying, 'No worries, Calvin. Got it. Good luck with your music!' Calvin acknowledged Dave's support, saying, 'Thanks for the encouragement, Dave. I'll keep working hard and making music. Take care!'Dave concluded their final farewell by saying, 'See ya, Calvin! Stay awesome. Catch ya later.'

On October 8, 2023, at 3:13 pm, Dave thanked Calvin for a compliment regarding a car he had restored and modified, adding custom exhaust and performance upgrades. Dave expressed pride in his work and shared that he had spent a lot of time and effort on it, describing it as a passion and a way to get away from everyday stress. Calvin responded with admiration, sharing a photo of a car driving down a street with a traffic light. Dave further elaborated on his love for tinkering with engines from a young age, comparing it to his sanctuary. On October 23, 2023, at 2:17 pm, Dave thanked Calvin for the compliment on his work, praising the attention to detail and sharing a photo of a brown amp with a black knob and a brown cover. Calvin appreciated the support and expressed gratitude. On September 13, 2023, at 10:56 am, Calvin thanked Dave for the compliment on his music, sharing that it reminded him of the good times at concerts and the excitement of making a difference and sharing his story. Calvin expressed gratitude for the positive feedback and shared plans for a tour and growing his brand.

On 11:50 am on 16 May, 2023, Calvin expressed gratitude to Dave, saying, 'Thanks, Dave! Can't wait to get back to making music. Anything exciting you're working on these days?' Dave responded with excitement about opening his car shop the previous week and invited some friends over to celebrate, sharing that it has been amazing. Calvin congratulated Dave and expressed that his excitement is contagious, encouraging him to keep up the great work. On 3:15 pm on 21 June, 2023, Calvin again thanked Dave, mentioning a photo of a view from a small town in Japan with an unbelievably stunning mountain view. Dave asked if Calvin had been to the place yet, to which Calvin replied, 'Nope, not yet! I haven't been there before, but it's on my to-do list for after my tour with Frank Ocean ends. Can't wait to see them in person!' Calvin shared a photo of a person on skis on a snowy mountain. On 4:45 pm on 26 March, 2023, Calvin thanked Dave once more, saying, 'Thanks, Dave! Gonna have fun and stay safe with it. Bye!'
On 5:46 pm on 2 November, 2023, Calvin praised Dave for his effort, saying, 'Wow, they look great! You really put in a lot of effort. Well done!'
Thanks, Calvin! Really appreciate you noticing the effort I put into this.
Wow, Calvin! Working with different artists and crafting great sounds will definitely help you reach your goals. Keep it up and keep making a difference!
Thanks, Dave! Your support and encouragement mean a lot to me. I'm determined to make my dreams come true.
Thanks so much, Calvin. Your support means everything to me. I'll keep pushing and reaching for them.
No worries, Dave. Keep going for it. You got this!

On 5:46 pm on 2 November, 2023, Calvin wished Dave good luck with his work, sharing a photo of a record player sitting on the floor next to a couch. Calvin encouraged Dave to explore different styles and times, noting that it can open up new perspectives and that broadening musical knowledge is awesome. Dave expressed gratitude and enthusiasm, saying that classic rock has had a huge impact on music and that it's always fun to find new tunes. They agreed to see each other soon, with Dave heading back to work and Calvin wishing him well. On 12:35 am on 14 August, 2023, Calvin further wished Dave good luck, emphasizing his support and that Dave has his backing. He encouraged Dave to keep growing and that it will be worth it, promising to see him soon.

On 15 October, 2023, at 9:39 am, Dave thanked Calvin for his support, expressing that it is great to have a friend who believes in him. Dave shared his determination to keep pushing forward, emphasizing the importance of Calvin's belief in him. Calvin responded by affirming his support and encouraging Dave to never forget his value. On 13 September, 2023, at 10:56 am, Dave thanked Calvin for his kind words and support, sharing a photo of his garage and expressing appreciation for Calvin's visit to Boston. Calvin reciprocated by expressing gratitude for Dave's support and looking forward to his visit. On 31 May, 2023, at 6:06 pm, Calvin thanked Dave for his support, indicating that it means a lot to him, and Dave responded by expressing excitement for Calvin's upcoming trip to Boston.

On 10:54 am on 17 November, 2023, Dave shared a calming experience with Calvin and invited him to catch up. Calvin informed Dave about accepting an invitation to perform at an upcoming show in Boston, expressing excitement about the musical experience. Dave congratulated Calvin and expressed interest in hearing more details and potentially attending one of his shows in Boston. Dave then invited Calvin to catch up when he is free. On 9:19 am on 2 September, 2023, Calvin shared that he had booked a flight to Boston and was excited about his upcoming trip. Dave acknowledged Calvin's trip and invited him to catch up in Boston, asking when Calvin would be free. Calvin confirmed his willingness to catch up and wished Dave a safe trip.

On May 1, 2023, at 6:24 pm, Dave expressed gratitude to Calvin for valuing his work and the joy it brings to others. Calvin responded by praising Dave's hard work and talent, encouraging him to continue. Calvin also shared a photo of a beautiful gold necklace with a diamond pendant, expressing his appreciation for Dave's work. Dave was impressed by the necklace and asked where Calvin got it. Later, Dave shared a photo of his shop with Calvin, indicating his continued motivation. On September 15, 2023, at 12:13 am, Dave thanked Calvin for his appreciation and reiterated his commitment to making people happy and doing what he loves. Calvin encouraged Dave to keep making people happy and doing what he loves, emphasizing the importance of this in his career. Calvin then wished Dave well and said they would see each other soon.

On 26 March, 2023, Dave congratulated Calvin on achieving an awesome moment, specifically referring to Calvin's experience of driving a new red sports car. Calvin shared a photo of the car and expressed his excitement about finally owning it, describing the feeling of stepping inside as an adrenaline rush. Dave praised the car and congratulated Calvin, noting how well-deserved it was after all the hard work. On 31 August, 2023, Dave further congratulated Calvin on an incredible experience, this time on performing on a big stage, which Calvin described as a dream come true and a surreal moment. Calvin thanked Dave for the congrats, expressing his gratitude and excitement about both the car and the performance.

Calvin shared a photo of a band playing on stage with lights on, indicating a recent performance with his bandmates. He expressed his plans to expand his brand worldwide and grow his fanbase, emphasizing the importance of working with artists from around the globe and challenging himself to create special music. Calvin shared his motivation and the success of the performance, stating, 'Look at the photo of how I performed with the boys last night, they are great at the music!'. Dave praised Calvin's efforts and encouraged him to keep making a difference. Calvin thanked Dave for his support and expressed his determination to achieve his goals. Later, Dave showed Calvin a photography of a band performing on stage with bright lights, describing the fun and electrifying atmosphere of the rock concert in Boston. Calvin responded positively, expressing his admiration for the jam sessions and asking if Dave had any recordings.

On 4 October, 2023 at 2:44 pm, Calvin and Dave discussed their shared goals and the importance of hard work and determination. Calvin expressed his wish for Dave to do well and achieve success, stating, 'Wishing you all the best until we meet again!'
On 2 November, 2023 at 5:46 pm, Calvin wished Dave good luck with his work and shared a photo of a record player. He said, 'Good luck with work, see ya!'

On 15 September, 2023 at 12:13 am, Calvin encouraged Dave to keep making people happy and doing what he loves, expressing that they would see each other soon. Calvin said, 'See you soon, have a nice one!'

On October 29, 2023, at 10:49 am, Calvin inquired about Dave's car project progress, expressing his excitement and asking how the project was going. Dave responded that the car project was doing well and that he had just finished restoring it, sharing that he would be happy to show Calvin. Calvin complimented Dave on his photography and mentioned that his album was almost finished, offering to send some previews. Dave shared a photo of his garage, which was a little dirty but well-organized, and Calvin asked what had made Dave start working on cars. Dave explained that his fascination with how machines work had started when he was ten, and he had fixed an old car in a neighbor's garage, which sparked his love for car engineering. He shared a photo of a man working on a car in a garage, emphasizing the sense of accomplishment he felt from transforming the car. On September 15, 2023, at 12:13 am, Calvin inquired about Dave's car hobby, mentioning a conversation they had previously had. Dave shared a photo of a man standing next to a classic car, which he had restored, and Calvin complimented him on his work, noting that it reminded him of the movie Ratatouille, which is about following your dreams.

On 5:22 pm on 11 August, 2023, Dave said goodbye to Calvin, wishing him well. Dave said, 'See ya, Calvin! Stay awesome. Catch ya later.' Calvin acknowledged Dave's well-wishes and said goodbye, expressing gratitude and sharing his plans to try something new in Tokyo. Calvin said, 'Thanks, Dave! Never tried it, but it's supposed to be awesome. Gonna give it a shot while in Tokyo!' Dave encouraged Calvin, saying, 'Do it, Calvin! Once you try it, you'll never go back. Bon voyage and have fun!' Calvin thanked Dave and bid him farewell, saying, 'Thanks, Dave! I'll definitely give it a shot. Appreciate the encouragement! See you soon, bye!' On 12:35 am on 14 August, 2023, Calvin wished Dave good luck and bid him farewell, saying, 'You got this, Dave! I'm always here for you. Seeing your enthusiasm is amazing. Keep growing, buddy. It'll be worth it! Good luck with that. See ya!'

Take it easy till then.' Calvin responded positively, expressing his own anticipation and excitement, saying, 'Count me in. Can't wait to create something special. See you soon!' Dave further confirmed his anticipation and reiterated his advice, saying, 'Yep, Calvin! Can't wait to see you soon. Take it easy till then.' On November 13, 2023, at 9:15 pm, Calvin expressed anticipation for Dave's future work, saying, 'Yeah, it's exciting to see where these new ideas lead. It's all about growing and evolving! Have a good one. I need to go now. Take care, Dave!' Dave acknowledged Calvin's enthusiasm and encouraged him, saying, 'For sure, Calvin! Growing and evolving is key for any artist. Don't stop pushing yourself and keep exploring. Can't wait to see what you come up with next! See ya Cal! Take care!'

Dave expressed gratitude to Calvin, mentioning that it was a fun project and that he restored a car last year which he sold to a collector. Dave shared his passion for car engineering, which began when he was ten and he fixed an old car in a neighbor's garage. He mentioned that he has been working on cars ever since, and shared a photo of a man working on a car in a garage. Calvin praised Dave's skill and determination, asking if the car was a classic and if Dave still had it. Dave confirmed it was a fun project and that he sold the car to a collector, but he is now working on a new, challenging project. Dave also shared a photo of a black car parked in a parking lot. Additionally, Dave expressed gratitude to Calvin, mentioning that his work involves various types of car maintenance and restorations, and shared a photo of a man standing next to a classic car he had restored, indicating it was a significant project. He emphasized the satisfaction of seeing the finished product and the positive reactions from people. Dave also shared that he works on all kinds of cars at the shop, from regular maintenance to full restorations of classic cars, and that it keeps him busy and happy.

Calvin expressed excitement about Dave's photography, noting the lights and people in a photo and looking forward to hearing Dave's emotions when he sees it in person. Calvin also mentioned that he was going to Tokyo next month and wished he could go back to places like the one in the photo. Dave shared that he had been getting into photography recently, capturing stunning sunset colors and beautiful cityscapes. Calvin encouraged Dave, expressing hope that his photography was bringing him lots of joy and asking about his car project. Dave confirmed that he was enjoying his photography as a creative outlet and invited Calvin to see his work. Calvin responded positively, showing interest in seeing Dave's photography.
